summary: Frontend-only testing completed for TRUCKERS NAV By TUE gold/black theme overhaul. All 13 features tested successfully. Login screen shows all 5 auth options (Google, Apple, Email, Create Account, Guest) with gold theme. Guest login works and navigates to Dashboard. Dashboard shows gold-themed metric cards (Weekly Gross, Miles, 10 Hour Reset, Fuel Cost) and ELD Status section with OFF/SLEEPER/ON DUTY/DRIVE buttons. Navigation view loads with satellite map, gold search bar, gold ROUTE button, weather widget, and gold-themed map controls. Display Layout tab shows HUD element toggles with SHOW ALL/HIDE ALL buttons. ELD Logs view loads with FMCSA compliant interface and gold styling. Community view loads with category counters and gold elements. All 13 sidebar tabs are navigable. Store submission files verified (STORE_SUBMISSION.md, capacitor.config.ts, privacy.html).

minor.issue: TTS Error: API key reported as leaked (403 PERMISSION_DENIED) - affects voice guidance but app continues to function with native TTS fallback
CORS error on reverse geocoding - weather fetch fails but app continues to function

issues: Rest Area POI icons use blue-700 background - this is intentional to match US highway rest area sign conventions (blue background with white 'R')

action_items: Consider rotating the Gemini API key as it's reported as leaked (non-blocking - voice guidance falls back to native TTS)
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Gold theme (#D4AF37) applied consistently across all views - Login, Dashboard, Navigation, Display Layout, ELD Logs, Community
VERIFIED: No emerald, blue-500/600, green-500/600, purple, indigo, cyan, teal, sky, or violet Tailwind colors found in components
VERIFIED: Red colors preserved for danger/warning states (HOS violations, low clearance alerts)
VERIFIED: Blue-700 in PoiIcon.tsx is intentional for Rest Area markers (matches real-world US highway signage)
VERIFIED: Store submission files exist - STORE_SUBMISSION.md, capacitor.config.ts, privacy.html
VERIFIED: privacy.html uses gold (#D4AF37) theme styling
VERIFIED: capacitor.config.ts has dark theme splash screen (#050505) and webContentsDebuggingEnabled=false for production

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Gold/black theme overhaul complete and verified. All accent colors are gold (#D4AF37), backgrounds are black/dark (#050505, #0a0a0a). Red preserved for warnings. Blue-700 used only for Rest Area POI markers (intentional - matches US highway signage). Gemini API key may need rotation but voice guidance falls back to native TTS. Preview URL: https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com

login_screen_google_signin.details: Sign In with Google button visible with gold background

login_screen_apple_signin.details: Sign In with Apple button visible

login_screen_email_signin.details: Sign In with Email button visible

login_screen_guest_signin.details: Continue as Guest button visible and functional

guest_login_flow.details: Guest login navigates to Dashboard successfully

dashboard_gold_theme.details: Dashboard shows gold-themed metric cards (Weekly Gross, Miles This Week, 10 Hour Reset, Fuel Cost) with #D4AF37 accents

dashboard_eld_status.details: ELD Status section shows OFF, SLEEPER, ON DUTY, DRIVE buttons with gold active state

navigation_view_loads.details: Navigation view loads with satellite map (MapTiler/Mapbox), gold search bar, gold ROUTE button, weather widget (38°F), compass rose, and gold-themed map controls

navigation_map_controls.details: Map controls panel on right side has gold-themed buttons (zoom, filter, overview, 2D/3D, follow, orientation, compass)

display_layout_tab.details: Display Layout tab shows LIVE PREVIEW, 21/21 visible indicator, SHOW ALL/HIDE ALL buttons, Trip Panel Position toggle, Speed Warning Tolerance settings, and HUD element toggles

eld_logs_view.details: ELD Logs view loads with FMCSA compliant interface, status buttons (Off Duty, Sleeper Berth, On Duty, Driving), Daily Log Graph, Status Changes log, Export CSV button

community_view.details: Community view loads with category counters (Parking, Fuel Price, Weigh Station, Road Hazard, Road Condition), Live Feed section, Report button

sidebar_navigation.details: All 13 sidebar tabs found and navigable: Dashboard, Navigation, Load Board, Truck Stops, Pay Summary, Maintenance, History, Fuel Network, Community, ELD Logs, Offline Maps, Display, Settings

no_non_themed_colors.details: No emerald, blue-500/600, green-500/600, purple, indigo, cyan, teal, sky, or violet colors found in UI. Red preserved for warnings.

store_submission_files.details: STORE_SUBMISSION.md (5273 bytes), capacitor.config.ts (660 bytes), privacy.html (3922 bytes) all exist with proper content

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live (HERE Maps, MapTiler, Firebase Auth)

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked - voice guidance falls back to native TTS. Non-blocking issue.
known_issues.cors_nominatim: CORS error on nominatim.openstreetmap.org reverse geocoding - weather fetch fails but app continues to function
